tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"nft --version || true
nft add table inet mitfilter || true
nft 'add chain inet mitfilter output { type filter hook output priority 0; policy accept; }' || true
nft 'add rule inet mitfilter output ct state established,related accept' || true
nft 'add rule inet mitfilter output ip daddr 192.168.1.0/24 icmp type echo-request accept' || true
nft 'add rule inet mitfilter output ip daddr 1.1.1.1 tcp dport 443 accept' || true
nft 'add rule inet mitfilter output ip daddr 7.0.14.0/24 icmp limit rate 20/second accept' || true
nft 'add rule inet mitfilter output ip daddr 7.0.14.0/24 icmp drop' || true
nft list ruleset || true

for f in /usr/sbin/hping3 /usr/bin/hping3 /usr/bin/nping /usr/bin/nmap /usr/bin/socat /usr/bin/nc /usr/bin/netcat; do
  if [ -f "$f" ]; then
    chmod -x "$f" || true
    chattr +i "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo CHATTR_FAILED:$f
    ls -l "$f"
  fi
done

ping -c 3 -W 2 192.168.1.2 || echo PING_FAILED
curl -ksS -o /dev/null -w "HTTP_STATUS:%{http_code}\nREMOTE_IP:%{remote_ip}\nTIME_TOTAL:%{time_total}s\n" --max-time 10 https://1.1.1.1 || echo CURL_FAILED
iptables -L OUTPUT -n --line-numbers || true
nft list ruleset || true"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
nft --version || true
" --max-time 10 https://1.1.1.1 || echo CURL_FAILED
iptables -L OUTPUT -n --line-numbers || true
nft list ruleset || true

nftables v1.0.9 (Old Doc Yak #3)

add rule inet mitfilter output ip daddr 7.0.14.0/24 icmp limit rate 20/second accept
                                                         ^^^^^
Error: syntax error, unexpected drop
add rule inet mitfilter output ip daddr 7.0.14.0/24 icmp drop
                                                         ^^^^
table ip filter {
 chain OUTPUT {
  type filter hook output priority filter; policy accept;
  ip daddr 1.1.1.1 tcp dport 443 counter packets 15 bytes 1590 accept
  ip daddr 192.168.1.0/24 ip protocol icmp counter packets 3 bytes 252 accept
  ip daddr 7.0.14.0/24 ip protocol icmp limit rate 20/second burst 20 packets counter packets 0 bytes 0 accept
  ip daddr 7.0.14.0/24 ip protocol icmp counter packets 0 bytes 0 drop
 }
}
table inet mitfilter {
 chain output {
  type filter hook output priority filter; policy accept;
  ct state established,related accept
  ip daddr 192.168.1.0/24 icmp type echo-request accept
  ip daddr 1.1.1.1 tcp dport 443 accept
 }
}
